record_id.description: RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record.

kind.description: Kind is the evidence kind, always `ci` for this record family.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the archived plan path associated with the record.

plan_stem.description: PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the record.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the record.

recorded_at.description: RecordedAt is the record creation timestamp.

status.description: Status is the CI result status.

provider.description: Provider is the CI provider name when one is available.

url.description: URL is the CI run URL when one is available.

reason.description: Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record.

EvidenceCIRecord.description: EvidenceCIRecord is the command-owned CI evidence artifact.
